text: I find myself surrounded by the artifacts and signs of contemporary innovation. The glass meeting room, faintly lit with blue hues, seems both inviting and sterile—an altar of modern collaboration. The bold and colorful wall, shouting "R+D", fills me with a sense of curiosity and wonder. Here, the air vibrates with the ambitions of progress; yet I feel a slight detachment, as if my presence is meant for observation rather than participation. There is excitement in the pursuit of knowledge—paired, inevitably, with a trace of anxiety about what all this striving truly means.
